Click a character to generate its share code, then copy it to send to a friend.

FINAL STANDINGS
Fate Weaves a Soul...
🌌
Summon a Legend
The fates will choose a realm, race, class, stats, skills and origin — pausing at each step so you can witness the soul taking shape. When complete, you may save or reroll.
